demographics.audit_notes: Data aligns well with 1990 Decennial Census for Tract 338.0. Newly added fields are sourced from the same census or estimated where direct data is unavailable.

socioeconomic.audit_notes: Data aligns well with 1990 Decennial Census. Some new fields (uninsured, eviction rate) are not available for this period and are set to null.
Values are plausible linear interpolations between the 1990 and 2000 census data points.
Data aligns well with 2000 Decennial Census. Eviction filing rate data is not available for this period.
Values are plausible linear interpolations between the 2000 and 2010 census data points.
Data aligns well with ACS 2006-2010 5-Year Estimates. Unemployment rate reflects the impact of the Great Recession.
Data aligns well with ACS 2011-2015 5-Year Estimates.
Data aligns well with recent ACS 5-Year Estimates. Unemployment rate reflects the COVID-19 pandemic spike. Eviction filing rate was artificially low due to moratoriums.
Values are plausible estimates based on the latest available ACS data (2018-2022) and BLS unemployment data.
Values are plausible estimates based on the latest available ACS data (2018-2022) and BLS unemployment data. Eviction rate rebounds post-moratorium.
Values are projections based on recent trends observed in ACS and BLS data.
